Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 5:

This patch is in limbo. Perhaps it needs more reviews.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

There are unfortunately functional problems in this test that prevent it from usefully exercising NRS.

Beyond that, while the NRS code is being exercised using the different ORR and CRR algorithms, there is no real way to verify if those algorithms are actually doing the right thing. That isn't a requirement for the patch to land, but still leaves me wondering if they area implemented correctly and/or may suffer regressions. 

it would also be useful to add a test for TBF now that it has landed.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 5: -Code-Review

Any plans for a update?

Patch Set 5:

Sorry, but now I switched to another high priority tasks and can't update it.
But yes I have plans to update it later.

Patch Set 5:

(12 comments)

Found some more minor issues in this patch.  It would be nice to get an update.

commit.message:
LU-3266 test: regression tests for nrs policies

Tests make IO for each policy with different parametrs.
